$comment: Codebase Intelligence hooks for VS Code Copilot (agent mode). Uses Claude Code-compatible format per https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/hooks

SessionStart.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook SessionStart --agent vscode-copilot || true

UserPromptSubmit.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook UserPromptSubmit --agent vscode-copilot || true

PreToolUse.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook PreToolUse --agent vscode-copilot || true

PostToolUse.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook PostToolUse --agent vscode-copilot || true

PreCompact.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook PreCompact --agent vscode-copilot || true

SubagentStart.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook SubagentStart --agent vscode-copilot || true

SubagentStop.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook SubagentStop --agent vscode-copilot || true

Stop.command: command -v {oak-cli-command} >/dev/null 2>&1 && {oak-cli-command} ci hook Stop --agent vscode-copilot || true
